biography.philosophy: Write a short paragraph about your approach to portraiture — what you look for, how you want subjects to feel, what makes a portrait succeed for you.
biography.background: Share where you come from and how you found photography. A few sentences about your path so far.
biography.experience: Describe the kind of work you take on, the kind of light and locations you favor, and what a session with you feels like.
biography.currentFocus: What you're working on now and what kind of projects you're open to. End with a clear invitation to get in touch.

portraitImage.alt: Portrait of Jamie Rodriguez, friendly photographer with camera
